basic_details.job_title: SRCASW Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women (SRCASW)
basic_details.short_information: Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women (SRCASW) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website of SRCASW. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SRCASW Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: As per UGC regulations for appointment of regular Assistant Professor
qualification.details: Qualifications as per UGC regulations for regular Assistant Professor.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1500 per lecture subject to a maximum of Rs. 50,000 per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SRCASW Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.rajgurucollege.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SRCASW Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SRCASW Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SRCASW Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Qualifications as per UGC regulations for regular Assistant Professor.

content_sections.heading: SRCASW Assistant Professor Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 1500 per lecture subject to a maximum of Rs. 50,000 per month.

content_sections.heading: SRCASW Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SRCASW Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.rajgurucollege.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SRCASW Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SRCASW Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the SRCASW Assistant Professor recruitment is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the college by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Assistant Professor (Psychology) post at Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor position is 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 1500 per lecture, with a maximum limit of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What are the required qualifications for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The qualifications required are as per UGC regulations for the appointment of regular Assistant Professors.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the SRCASW Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women: https://www.rajgurucollege.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Shaheed Rajguru College of Applied Sciences for Women?
faq.answer: The official website is https://www.rajgurucollege.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.
